register.title: Login Required for Item Registration
register.description: Please log in using one of the following methods to register items.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.description: Please sign up using one of the following methods.

login.title: Log In
login.description: Please log in using one of the following methods.

notice.oauthOnly: For security reasons, email/password registration is not supported.

errors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already registered with a different method. Please log in using the original method.
errors.OAuthSignin: Failed to start OAuth authentication. Please try again.
errors.OAuthCallback: An error occurred during OAuth authentication. Please try again.
errors.OAuthCreateAccount: Failed to create account. Please try again.
errors.Callback: An error occurred during authentication callback. Please try again.
errors.SessionRequired: Login is required for this operation.
errors.default: An error occurred during authentication. Please try again.
